text: The bet explorer is redesigned into a grouped, collapsible venue -> race -> bet layout (mirroring the ai-betfair recommendations page).
Binary won/lost is replaced with richer badges: WON, PLACED (EW place-only), LOST — so each-way place-only settlements are visible.
It depends on the ew-metadata-pipeline (API must return is_each_way, each_way_divisor, number_of_places, settlement_type, effective_place_odds), which must be implemented first.
